findings.description: TB-005 is the wrong trust boundary for the research agent
findings.resolution: TB-007 already existed from PR #122. TB-005 reference already corrected in cspec-agent-migration spec.

findings.description: WebSearch/WebFetch untested in plugin agent context
AGENT_CONTEXT.md not in files-touched list
findings.resolution: Files-touched list is informational, not enforced. AGENT_CONTEXT.md was updated in the feature.

findings.description: INV-008 tests only 3 of 7 section headers
findings.resolution: Research brief format is LLM-generated. Testing all 7 headers would be fragile; 3 tested headers cover the important sections.

findings.description: ABS-010 doesn't model network-read agents
"(forked context)" annotation becomes stale
findings.resolution: AP-027/PMB-006 already removed context: fork. The annotation text is gone from current SKILL.md. Finding is stale.

findings.description: No prompt injection / data-treatment fence for research brief
findings.resolution: UNTRUSTED_RESEARCH_BRIEF fence added to cspec orchestrator Step 2 (PR #130). Structural enforcement matching fix-diff-reviewer pattern.

findings.description: INV-005 placeholder tokens under-specified
findings.resolution: Agent file uses the stated tokens. Functional test VP-002 validates the agent works, making structural token check secondary.

findings.description: INV-004 denylist too narrow (2 signatures for 58-line prompt)
BND-001 denylist covers only 2 of 4 orchestrator concerns
No graceful degradation for network-unavailable environments
No harness-prior suppression invariant
findings.resolution: Agent file already contains detailed output format instructions. Explicit suppression directive unnecessary given structured brief template.

findings.description: Task dynamic context injection mechanism undocumented
findings.resolution: Task prompt parameter IS the dynamic context injection. Documented by M-1 through M-4 migration pattern.

findings.description: TB-002 not referenced for web content → artifact pipeline
findings.resolution: TB-002 JSON interpolation concern does not apply to markdown briefs. Boundary pattern overlap noted in this finding; no code change needed.

findings.description: Complexity budget LOC underestimate
findings.resolution: Feature shipped. LOC estimate was for scope assessment, not enforcement.

findings.description: ABS-010 consumer list needs explicit cspec entry
findings.resolution: Merged with DF-005 — ABS-010 update will include consumer mapping.

findings.description: INV-011 Task addition broadens cspec capability beyond research agent
findings.resolution: Accepted scope expansion. Task necessary for migration. DD-003 documents this decision.

findings.description: XSS via marked.js rendering — sanitization required
findings.resolution: DOMPurify.sanitize(marked.parse(text)) implemented in build-dashboard.sh line 1012

findings.description: CDN URL unpinned — supply chain + version drift risk
findings.resolution: marked@14.0.0 and dompurify@3.2.4 pinned with SRI hashes in build-dashboard.sh lines 951-959

findings.description: `</script>` injection in JSON data block
findings.resolution: sed escapes </ as <\/ before HTML embedding in build-dashboard.sh line 492

findings.description: R-007 deletion cascade incomplete — 6+ files not listed
findings.resolution: build-dashboard.sh is the only implementation file. 6+ files refers to CDN deps in HTML, not project files.

findings.description: Helper script underspecified — language, dependencies, ABS entry missing
findings.resolution: Single bash script with no external deps beyond jq. ABS entry would be overkill.

findings.description: Stale installed copy of build-dashboard.sh persists on user upgrades
Browser-dependent behavior untestable in shell test infrastructure
findings.resolution: Browser rendering inherently untestable in CI. Build script tests JSON aggregation.

findings.description: Success output and error context missing from skill
findings.resolution: Skill already reports output path. 15-line skill does not need more output structure.

findings.description: No advisory notification for dead intensity_calibration_mode config keys on existing projects
findings.resolution: Old config key never documented for end users. Silent compatibility is correct.
